data.location: 282 S Sharon Amity Rd, Suite 104 and 106B, Charlotte, NC 28211
data.short_description: Kitchen Social, the growing Ohio-based brand, is planning to open in Cotswold Village in Charlotte, targeting a mid-January 2027 opening. The roughly 4,200-square-foot space will seat about 165 guests with indoor-outdoor dining, a covered patio and an indoor-outdoor bar, and will serve a scratch-made menu with Indian, Asian, Mexican and Italian influences.

Botanico Hospitality Group is bringing back the Botanico brand in a new Midtown Atlanta location in the former Lure space, currently undergoing remodeling and decorating. The upscale Latin concept will have around 150 seats and serve cuisine inspired by Colombia, Venezuela, Mexico, Peru, Cuba and the Caribbean.

data.location: 1025 Howell Mill Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
data.short_description: Botanico Hospitality Group's Incognito is a cocktail bar with a modern, chic dive bar feel and elevated mixology in West Midtown Atlanta. Food will come via a truck from El Santo Gallo, and the bar will include pool tables, banquet seating, a DJ, outdoor picnic tables and several screens.

data.status: opening planned for October 29th at 10 a.m.
data.short_description: Knuckies Sandwiches and Sips is planned for the Medley development in Johns Creek with an opening planned for October 29th at 10 a.m., in step with the broader Medley development. The 10th Knuckies location will introduce a more elevated version of the brand with a chef-driven sandwich menu and a dirty soda component.

data.location: 4725 S Atlanta Rd SE, Atlanta, GA 30339
data.status: expected to open in the next 60-70 days
data.short_description: Trap Wingz is opening a new Atlanta location in the strip development that previously housed Bites, expected to open in the next 60-70 days. The concept is known for decadent combos featuring crispy wings, burgers, fried fish, Philly cheesesteaks and fries, and specializes in takeout with online ordering.

data.status: expected to open in the next 60-90 days
data.short_description: Trap Wingz is opening a second new Atlanta location, expected to open in the next 60-90 days. The brand specializes in takeout and will be available for online ordering via platforms like DoorDash and GrubHub.

data.location: 2079 Joseph E Boone Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30314
data.event_date: end of May or early June
data.status: slated to open by the end of May or early June
data.short_description: Black Pizza is a new black-owned, family-friendly pizzeria opening in Bankhead, founded by Selam Afeworki and Natnael Tekeste along with additional partners. The full-service pizzeria will have dining room occupancy for up to 65 guests and specialize in New York-style slices, full pies, specialty pizzas, wings and fries.

Hawaiian Bros is planned for downtown Atlanta with franchisee Amin Ferdowsi targeting an opening in Q1 2027, marking MRCO's first Hawaiian Bros restaurant. The plate lunch concept serves rice, chicken and a side, with several chicken options including huli huli chicken and sides such as steamed vegetables and macaroni salad.

data.location: 675 W Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
data.short_description: Pour Intentions Wine Bar is a wine-focused lounge built around storytelling and curated experiences, located near the Fox Theatre. The menu features charcuterie boards, small plates, desserts, and a rotating by-the-glass wine list sourced from boutique and sustainable vineyards.

data.status: Targeting late May opening, pending final approvals
data.short_description: V's Coffee Collab is a compact, community-driven coffee shop in Roswell designed for conversation over laptop work, with limited indoor seating and a service window. The menu features house-roasted coffee, pastries from local vendors, and rotating retail coffee bags featuring artwork from local creatives.

data.status: Aiming for late May; may shift into June depending on construction and permits
data.short_description: Juice Time is a dessert and beverage spot in Roswell blending indulgent treats with lighter options, including Middle Eastern desserts not widely available locally. Menu highlights include fresh juices, smoothies, protein shakes, crepes and ice cream.

data.location: 3067 NE 163rd Road, North Miami Beach, FL 33160
data.status: targeting an opening by the beginning of June
data.short_description: Maestro Italian Bakery, led by partner Gabriele Bellini and founder Moreno Brugnoni, is preparing to open in North Miami Beach, focused on Italian baked goods made with organic, non-GMO flour from a small mill in northern Italy. The small space will have about 12 to 16 seats inside, with offerings including pasticcini, traditional Italian cakes, croissants, breads, pizza, focaccia and paninis.

Kook's Conch Fritters is a female veteran-owned pop-up serving South Florida, targeting a June 10, 2026 launch with its first event appearance at Juneteenth South Broward on June 20. The business will focus on conch fritter bites, conch salad and conch fritter batter that customers can purchase to fry at home, serving Broward, Miami-Dade and Palm Beach counties.

data.location: 1400 10th St Unit D, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
data.short_description: Baisel's African Restaurant is targeting a late June opening in West Palm Beach, owned by Godfred Baisel and his wife Faustina Baisel to bring Ghanaian and West African food to the area. The pickup-focused restaurant will start with about 14 seats and a menu including egusi, fufu, banku, okra soup, palm nut soup, jollof rice and grilled tilapia.

data.event_date: end of June or first week of July
data.status: targeting an end of June or first week of July opening
data.short_description: Will Morin and Kent Simmons are bringing Lenny's Grill & Subs back to Pensacola with their first franchise location for the brand. The neighborhood sub shop focuses on fresh-sliced meats, cheesesteaks, hot subs, cold subs, salads and wraps, with ordering through a pickup window, a digital kiosk and traditional counter service.

data.location: 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd., Suites 1 and 2, Jacksonville, FL 32226
data.status: targeting an early to mid-August opening
data.short_description: Southern Smokehouse, owned by Louis and Baylee Joseph of South Atlantic Hospitality, is preparing to open as the company's first barbecue concept and second restaurant. The full-service restaurant will have 120 seats and a full-service liquor bar, with a menu including traditional barbecue items, more salads than typical, handheld items, barbecue lasagna and a turkey leg.

Blackberry Creamery & Cafe is an ice cream-focused concept anchored within a larger outdoor food truck park in Jacksonville. Menu highlights include ice cream flavors like butter pecan bourbon and blackberry bliss, plus milkshakes, shaved ice, and fresh lemonades with custom mix-ins.

Supra Revolving Sushi Bar is a full-service restaurant in Jacksonville with a conveyor belt sushi system and a large dining room built for casual meals and groups. The menu includes sushi, hibachi, ramen, appetizers, milk tea, and alcoholic beverages.

data.location: 12553 Bartram Park Blvd., Suite 302, Jacksonville, FL 32258
data.short_description: Lucky Goat Coffee is a fast-casual coffee shop in Jacksonville's Bartram Park with indoor seating and a small patio, focused on approachable specialty coffee. Menu highlights include espresso drinks, cold brew, nitro, seasonal lattes, signature drinks like the Lucky Bomb, and pastries from local bakery partners.

Big Bone BBQ, from Donna Deverman-Clay and her husband Samuel Clay, is preparing to open in a historic 1918 home in Pensacola as a self-serve concept bringing Texas-style barbecue. The menu centers on dino beef ribs along with brisket, smoked braised beef cheeks, armadillo eggs and housemade sides and sauces.

George Schempf and his wife and co-owner Chris Doss are opening Donatos Pizza in Panama City, planning a full reconstruction of the former PanaRoma space in Stanford Station Plaza. The fast-casual restaurant will have nine seats, a pickup window and delivery service, with a menu centered on thin crust party-cut pizza, subs, salads and wings.
